period.timezone_note: Run date is 2026-07-14 KST. Previous successful cutoff was 2026-07-11T01:01:50Z. The current history supplied 27 later string rows and matched public web build metadata after reconciliation. latest_changes.json had empty string_changes. Ninety-seven previously published annotation identities missing from regenerated public web JSON were restored.

clusters.title: Age verification method choice
clusters.source_context: Six strings added together form an age-verification method picker for video selfie or government-ID scanning. The current localization family also contains method-unavailable and reload copy, while public API data includes Incode age-verification session and interview routes.
clusters.summary: 나이 인증을 진행할 때 영상 셀피와 정부 발급 신분증 스캔 중 사용할 방법을 고르는 문구입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings belong to the age-verification method picker for choosing a video selfie or a government-ID scan.

clusters.title: Age verification start failure
clusters.source_context: The start-failure string was added after the method-choice copy. The same current localization family includes a no-methods-available error and Reload action.
clusters.summary: Discord가 나이 인증 세션을 시작하지 못해 현재 창을 닫고 다시 시도하라는 오류입니다.
clusters.summary_en: Discord could not start the age-verification session and is asking the user to close the current window and try again.

clusters.title: Per-server profile bio
clusters.source_context: The current localization family places Server Bio beside per-server profile copy such as Tell this server a bit about yourself and Get Nitro to customize your bio per-server. The new history row only changes capitalization from Server bio to Server Bio.
clusters.summary: Server Bio는 특정 서버에서만 보이도록 따로 설정하는 서버별 프로필 소개글입니다.
clusters.summary_en: Server Bio is a profile bio customized for one server rather than the user's global profile bio.

clusters.title: LFG Channels help entry
clusters.source_context: The client contains a dedicated LFG Channels help-center constant and LFG/LFG-lock icons, while public experiment data includes LFG channel and LFG landing entries. The exact screen using this Learn more label was not confirmed.
clusters.summary: LFG Channels 도움말로 이동하는 링크이며, LFG는 함께 게임하거나 활동할 그룹을 찾는 Looking for Group을 뜻합니다.
clusters.summary_en: This is a help entry for LFG Channels; LFG means Looking for Group, or finding people to join a game or activity.

clusters.title: Server activity insights
clusters.source_context: The current English string family groups Activity & Origins and Server activity by hour of day with Server Insights, Buzzing time-of-day summaries, and weekday/weekend activity labels. The client also defines guild analytics overview endpoints.
clusters.summary: 서버 인사이트에서 시간대별 활동 패턴과 활동·유입 관련 요약을 보여주는 분석 영역의 라벨입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These labels belong to a server-insights area that summarizes activity by time of day and related activity or origin signals.

clusters.title: Paid subscription perk access timing
clusters.source_context: The two access-gate strings were added together. Current client code also uses the 2026-03-denormalized-perks-access-read experiment in ProductCatalog feature-access checks, but the exact perk using these labels was not confirmed.
clusters.summary: 유료 구독 시작 전이라 현재 특정 특전을 사용할 수 없다는 접근 제한 안내입니다.
clusters.summary_en: The user cannot access a perk yet because it becomes available when the paid subscription starts.

clusters.title: Spoiler Media Channel label
clusters.source_context: The current channel-type string family includes Media Channel (Limited), Media Channel (Age-Restricted), and Media Channel (Spoiler). Client channel flags separately define IS_MEDIA_CHANNEL and IS_SPOILER_CHANNEL.
clusters.summary: Media Channel에 스포일러 속성이 적용된 채널 유형 또는 상태를 나타내는 라벨입니다.
clusters.summary_en: This label identifies a Media Channel that also has the spoiler channel state or flag.

clusters.title: Personal profile widgets category
clusters.source_context: Current client code maps the PERSONAL widget type directly to this label. The same current string family contains Profile Widgets, Games I like, Add Widgets, and profile-board customization copy, and the client defines user profile-widget endpoints.
clusters.summary: Personal/개인용은 Profile Widgets에서 개인 프로필용 위젯을 구분하는 카테고리 라벨입니다.
clusters.summary_en: Personal is a category label for personal Profile Widgets, not an account type.

annotated_strings.value: Choose the option that works best for you.
Use a driver’s license, passport, or other government ID.
How would you like to verify your age?
Usually fastest and totally automatic. If we can’t confirm your age, you can scan your ID instead.
We couldn’t start age verification. Please close this window and try again.
Server activity by hour of day
You don't have access to this perk at the moment
This perk becomes available when your paid subscription starts

search_signals.notes: Exact-match public searches did not clarify the paid-perk or Activity & Origins labels; LFG results only confirmed the common Looking for Group usage. Local history, public web JSON, API/experiment data, and current client consumers remained the evidence base. Weak or deleted labels were deferred rather than filled with generic promotional explanations.

latest_changes.reason: data/latest_changes.json currently has empty string_changes dictionaries for en and ko.

publish.notes: Validation and publish metadata will be reconciled after the data/report commit is pushed.
